text:
A new chapter of Philippine sports history has been written as Carlos Yulo became the country’s first double Olympic gold medalist. Yulo reigned in both the men’s artistic gymnasticsfloor exerciseandvaultfinals in the 2024 Paris Games, giving the Philippines its second and third Olympic gold medals overall and its first-ever medals in Olympic gymnastics. He joins Tokyo Games gold medalistHidilyn Diazin the record books.

In boxing, both Tokyo Games silver medalistNesthy Petecioand Olympics newcomerAira Villegasbagged bronze medals in the women’s 57kg division and 50kg division, respectively.

With the two golds from Yulo and the two bronzes from Petecio and Villegas, the Philippines achieved its best Olympic medal haul yet.

The country also marked its100th yearof participation in the Olympics during the Paris Games, held fromJuly 26 to August 11. A total of 22 athletes represented the Philippines.

China’s government and official sporting bodies have condemned fans for using social media to attack and spread rumors about the country’s Olympians and said the behavior had an extremely negative impact on athletes, coaches, and their families.

Read more.

title: Paris Olympics 2024: Games, results, latest updates
description: The Philippines achieves its best Olympic medal haul yet as it also celebrates its 100th year of participation in the Games
